commands.review_summary:
The branch adds ClawHub exact-release trust checks before plugin install/update downloads, threads acknowledgement through CLI/update/onboarding/doctor/chat flows, updates docs/tests, and carries current-main compatibility fixes.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This is security/install-policy hardening rather than a bug report; current main source shows ClawHub artifact downloads happen without this acknowledgement trust gate.
